title: ilex crenata var. crenata
intro: Ilex crenata var. crenata, also known as Japanese holly or compact Japanese holly, is a compact and slow-growing shrub native to East Asia. Its medicinal properties include its ability to act as a diuretic and astringent, which can help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant is also rich in antioxidants, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Ilex crenata var. crenata include teas and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
